title: 161 Mathematics 3.   Shade three horizontal strips using a sketch pen of say, red colour
subject: Mathematics
unit: Unit L - cardboard as shown in Fig
activityTitle: 161 Mathematics 3.   Shade three horizontal strips using a sketch pen of say, red colour
objective:
To verify that the sum of any two sides of a triangle is always greater
than the third side
materials:
Thick sheet, coloured straws, adhesive, a pair of
scissors, cardboard, white sheet.
procedure:
1.   Take a cardboard of convenient size and paste a white sheet on it.
2.   Draw a triangle ABC of any dimension as shown in Fig.   1.
Fig. 1
3.   Cut straws of three different colours   (say pink, green and red) of the
same size as the three sides of the triangle.
observation:
On actual measurement
Measure of   ∠ A =_____.
Measure of   ∠ B =_____.
Measure of   ∠ ACD =_____.
∠ ACD =   ∠ A +   ∠   _____.
So, the exterior angle of a triangle is the ______ of its two _____ angles.
discussion:
This activity can be used to explain:
1.   The relationship between an exterior angle and its interior angles.
2.   Exterior angle of a triangle if interior angles are given.
3.   Unknown interior angle of a triangle if exterior angle is given.
168 Laboratory Manual – Elementary Stage
